seoTitle: Dysart vs East Cam — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Dysart and East Cam. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Dysart vs East Cam: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dysart and East Cam.
heading: Dysart vs East Cam — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dysart, Tasmania and East Cam, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: East Cam has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Dysart (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dysart or East Cam safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dysart has a flood risk score of 35/100, while East Cam scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dysart scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. East Cam scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dysart or East Cam?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. East Cam has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
